content_body:
Fresh air and mountain breezes 
Around fly honey bees 
Trucks sound down gravel roads 
Safe in this cabin we are stowed 
Surrounded by peace, serenity 
Along with clean and wonderful amenities 
Thank you for this lovely stay 
We hope to be back another day. 

We enjoyed our stay very much!
XOXO
Rachel, Julie, Lydia
title: Mayfly Lodge Poem
